title: LPC Associate
bio: Aya Riaz Mian is an LPC Associate at Riaz Counseling, supervised by Sarah Norwood (LPC-Supervisor), working with clients navigating ADHD, anxiety, autism, depression, codependency, relationship concerns, infidelity, racial identity, and trauma-related challenges. Aya’s primary areas of focus include relationship concerns, neurodivergence, and trauma, while also supporting individuals experiencing mood disorders. Aya provides individual and couples therapy services for teens (13–19) and adults (20–64), offering affirming care for LGBTQ+, bisexual, lesbian, and heterosexual clients. Drawing from evidence-based approaches including Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT), Attachment-Based Therapy, Emotionally Focused Therapy, Somatic Therapy, Trauma-Focused Therapy, and culturally sensitive practices, Aya creates a supportive and collaborative space where clients can explore healing, connection, and personal growth.
